description: Two-stage QA decision tree (v2). Stage 1 selects exactly one skeleton template according to the updated QA tree (control principle → pressure/circuit → control strategy → cylinder type). Stage 2 collects only sizing constraints needed for component selection.

skeleton_v2_vc_li_differential.title: Valve-controlled, Load Independent (ConstantPump + 4/3 DCV + Double-Acting Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_vc_li_double_rod.title: Valve-controlled, Load Independent (ConstantPump + 4/3 DCV + Double-rod Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_vc_li_plunger.title: Valve-controlled, Load Independent (ConstantPump + 3/2 DCV + Plunger Cylinder (single-acting))

skeleton_v2_vc_li_telescopic.title: Valve-controlled, Load Independent (ConstantPump + 4/3 DCV + Telescopic Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_vc_ls_differential.title: Valve-controlled, Load Sensing (LS) (VariablePump + 4/3 DCV + Double-Acting Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_vc_ls_double_rod.title: Valve-controlled, Load Sensing (LS) (VariablePump + 4/3 DCV + Double-rod Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_vc_ls_plunger.title: Valve-controlled, Load Sensing (LS) (VariablePump + 3/2 DCV + Plunger Cylinder (single-acting))

skeleton_v2_vc_ls_telescopic.title: Valve-controlled, Load Sensing (LS) (VariablePump + 4/3 DCV + Telescopic Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_oc_rs_differential.title: Pump-controlled, Open Circuit (Control of rotational speed + ConstantPump + 4/3 DCV + Double-Acting Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_oc_rs_double_rod.title: Pump-controlled, Open Circuit (Control of rotational speed + ConstantPump + 4/3 DCV + Double-rod Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_oc_rs_plunger.title: Pump-controlled, Open Circuit (Control of rotational speed + ConstantPump + 3/2 DCV + Plunger Cylinder (single-acting))

skeleton_v2_pc_oc_rs_telescopic.title: Pump-controlled, Open Circuit (Control of rotational speed + ConstantPump + 4/3 DCV + Telescopic Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_oc_sa_differential.title: Pump-controlled, Open Circuit (Control of swivel angle + VariablePump + 4/3 DCV + Double-Acting Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_oc_sa_double_rod.title: Pump-controlled, Open Circuit (Control of swivel angle + VariablePump + 4/3 DCV + Double-rod Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_oc_sa_plunger.title: Pump-controlled, Open Circuit (Control of swivel angle + VariablePump + 3/2 DCV + Plunger Cylinder (single-acting))

skeleton_v2_pc_oc_sa_telescopic.title: Pump-controlled, Open Circuit (Control of swivel angle + VariablePump + 4/3 DCV + Telescopic Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_oc_both_differential.title: Pump-controlled, Open Circuit (Control of both + VariablePump + 4/3 DCV + Double-Acting Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_oc_both_double_rod.title: Pump-controlled, Open Circuit (Control of both + VariablePump + 4/3 DCV + Double-rod Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_oc_both_plunger.title: Pump-controlled, Open Circuit (Control of both + VariablePump + 3/2 DCV + Plunger Cylinder (single-acting))

skeleton_v2_pc_oc_both_telescopic.title: Pump-controlled, Open Circuit (Control of both + VariablePump + 4/3 DCV + Telescopic Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_cc_rs_differential.title: Pump-controlled, Closed Circuit (Control of rotational speed + Closed-circuit variable pump + Double-Acting Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_cc_rs_double_rod.title: Pump-controlled, Closed Circuit (Control of rotational speed + Closed-circuit variable pump + Double-rod Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_cc_rs_plunger.title: Pump-controlled, Closed Circuit (rotational speed control + reversible pump + 3/2 DCV + single-acting plunger + charge/make-up)

skeleton_v2_pc_cc_rs_telescopic.title: Pump-controlled, Closed Circuit (Control of rotational speed + Closed-circuit variable pump + Telescopic Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_cc_sa_differential.title: Pump-controlled, Closed Circuit (Control of swivel angle + Closed-circuit variable pump + Double-Acting Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_cc_sa_double_rod.title: Pump-controlled, Closed Circuit (Control of swivel angle + Closed-circuit variable pump + Double-rod Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_cc_sa_plunger.title: Pump-controlled, Closed Circuit (swivel-angle control + reversible pump + 3/2 DCV + single-acting plunger + charge/make-up)

skeleton_v2_pc_cc_sa_telescopic.title: Pump-controlled, Closed Circuit (Control of swivel angle + Closed-circuit variable pump + Telescopic Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_cc_both_differential.title: Pump-controlled, Closed Circuit (Control of both + Closed-circuit variable pump + Double-Acting Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_cc_both_double_rod.title: Pump-controlled, Closed Circuit (Control of both + Closed-circuit variable pump + Double-rod Cylinder)

skeleton_v2_pc_cc_both_plunger.title: Pump-controlled, Closed Circuit (speed + swivel-angle control + reversible pump + 3/2 DCV + single-acting plunger + charge/make-up)

skeleton_v2_pc_cc_both_telescopic.title: Pump-controlled, Closed Circuit (Control of both + Closed-circuit variable pump + Telescopic Cylinder)

normalization.units: SI preferred; accept common engineering units and convert in post-processing if required.
normalization.boolean: Accept yes/no, true/false, required/not required, as well as domain phrases.

stage1.goal: Select exactly one skeletonId from the v2 32-template library.

nodes.prompt: Select the control principle: valve-controlled (directional valve is the main control element) or pump-controlled (motion is primarily controlled by pump/prime-mover control).

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Do you want valve-controlled motion (using a directional control valve as the main control element) or pump-controlled motion (using pump/prime-mover control as the main control element)?

nodes.prompt: For a valve-controlled system, select the system pressure concept: load independent (constant supply pressure) or load dependent (LS).

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please choose: load independent (constant supply pressure) or load dependent (LS/load sensing).

nodes.prompt: For a pump-controlled system, select the circuit type: open circuit (with tank) or closed circuit (main loop A/B).

intents.name: choose_circuit_type
intents.description: User states open vs closed circuit.

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please choose one: open circuit (with tank) or closed circuit (A/B loop).

nodes.prompt: Select the pump–motor control strategy: control of rotational speed, control of swivel angle (displacement), or control of both.

intents.name: choose_control_strategy
intents.description: User chooses rotational speed vs swivel angle vs both.

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please choose one: rotational speed control, swivel-angle (displacement) control, or both.

nodes.prompt: Select the cylinder type: differential (single-rod), double-rod, plunger (single-acting), or telescopic.

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Which cylinder type do you need: differential (single-rod), double-rod, plunger (single-acting), or telescopic?

stage2.goal: Collect block-level filtering inputs after a v2 skeleton is selected. Each active block is asked once, and the user may provide only the properties they want to constrain.

globalBlocks.prompt: Please define the global system parameters you want to constrain (e.g. Maximum operating pressure, Rated flow rate, Hydraulic fluid). You may provide only the properties you want to filter.

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please answer with labeled global properties, for example: Max operating pressure 210 bar; Rated flow rate 25 L/min; Hydraulic fluid HLP 46.

cylinder.prompt: Please define the cylinder parameters you want to constrain (e.g. Rated stroke, Piston diameter, Rod diameter, Rated cylinder advancing force, Rated pressure, Maximum operating pressure). You may provide only the properties you want to filter.

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please answer with labeled cylinder properties, for example: Stroke 800 mm; Piston diameter 120 mm; Rod diameter 60 mm; Force 20 kN; Rated pressure 250 bar.

conditionalBlocks.prompt: Please define the pump parameters you want to constrain (e.g. Specified maximum total flow rate, Nominal flow rate, Nominal outlet pressure, Specified maximum outlet pressure, Nominal speed of the drive, Specified maximum mechanical power). You may provide only the properties you want to filter.

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please answer with labeled pump properties, for example: Maximum total flow rate 30 L/min; Maximum outlet pressure 250 bar; Maximum mechanical power 5 kW.

conditionalBlocks.prompt: Please define the directional control valve parameters you want to constrain (e.g. Nominal flow rate, Specified maximum total flow rate, Maximum operating pressure, Normal operating pressure, Pressure difference). You may provide only the properties you want to filter.

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please answer with labeled DCV properties, for example: Nominal flow rate 20 L/min; Maximum operating pressure 250 bar; Pressure difference 0.6 bar.

conditionalBlocks.prompt: Please define the tank parameters you want to constrain (e.g. Nominal volume, Maximum operating pressure, maximum allowed length, maximum allowed width, maximum allowed height). You may provide only the properties you want to filter.

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please answer with labeled tank properties, for example: Nominal volume 80 L; Maximum operating pressure 20 bar; Length 800 mm; Width 500 mm; Height 900 mm.

conditionalBlocks.prompt: Please define the PRV parameters you want to constrain (e.g. Protection setpoint, Nominal flow rate, Pressure difference). You may provide only the properties you want to filter.

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please answer with labeled PRV properties, for example: Setpoint 180 bar; Nominal flow rate 25 L/min; Pressure difference 1 bar.

conditionalBlocks.prompt: Please define the accumulator parameters you want to constrain (e.g. Nominal volume, Pre-charge pressure, Dead volume). You may provide only the properties you want to filter.

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please answer with labeled accumulator properties, for example: Nominal volume 6 L; Pre-charge pressure 2.5 bar; Dead volume 0.5 L.

conditionalBlocks.prompt: Please define the check valve parameters you want to constrain (e.g. Nominal flow rate, Cracking pressure, Pressure difference). You may provide only the properties you want to filter.

onLowConfidence.clarificationPrompt: Please answer with labeled check valve properties, for example: Nominal flow rate 20 L/min; Cracking pressure 3 bar; Pressure difference 0.1 bar.
